For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a card that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Technical Machine: Turbo Energize
Description: The Pokémon this card is attached to can use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack. ) If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your turn. [C] Turbo EnergizeSearch your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Techno Radar

Name: Tulip
Description: Put up to 4 in any combination of [P] Pokémon and Basic [P] Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

Effects: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 100 less damage from attacks from Evolution Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Magby

Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a [F] Pokémon, this attack does 30 more damage.

Effects: Heal 120 damage from 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Plusle

Name: Blitzle
Effects: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

Effects: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

Effects: Attach a Basic [F] Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

Name: Garganacl
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may attach a Basic [F] Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, heal 30 damage from that Pokémon.

Effects: Discard any number of Pokémon Tool cards from your hand. This attack does 50 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

Effects: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Effects: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

Name: Cyclizar
Effects: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 70 more damage.

Name: Iron Jugulis

If this Pokémon has a Future Booster Energy Capsule attached, this attack can be used for [C][C][C].

Name: Reversal Energy
